description: Crystal Raiders Patch 4 (11 March 2024) — Turkish and Arabic Language Support, Server Name Changes (Albion East → Albion Asia, Albion West → Albion Americas), Mobile Changes, Combat Balance Changes (Fire Staffs, Hammers, Maces, Helmets, Armors, Capes), Fixes.

sections.heading: Turkish and Arabic Added
sections.description: Albion Online now offers full language support for Turkish and Arabic. These languages are selectable from the launcher or in-game Settings menu. Dedicated chat channels and news articles will appear in these languages.
sections.searchable_text: Turkish Arabic language support launcher Settings chat channels news articles translation

sections.heading: Server Names Changed
sections.searchable_text: Server Names Albion East Albion Asia Albion West Albion Americas

sections.heading: Mobile Changes
items: [Android] Vulkan can now be enabled via the settings menu for devices which support this
sections.searchable_text: Mobile Android Vulkan settings menu devices

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Fire Staffs Flame Pillar Great Fire Staff cooldown reduction 50% Hammers Earth Shatter Damage 55.58 66.6 Ground Pound Grovekeepers Range 14m 16m Maces Battle Howl Heavy Mace Cooldown 18s 20s Vendetta Camlann Mace Range 21m 23m Cooldown 30s 25s Helmets Hyper Focus Feyscale Hat Cooldown 30s 20s Duration 7s 5s Immortal Mistwalker Hood Duration 5s 6s Purifying Smoke Helmet of Valor Cooldown 45s 40s Armors Energy Source Royal Armor Max targets 5 10 Capes Fey Barrier Brecilien Cape Shield Value 200 230 Opening to Hell Demon Cape Damage players 50 55 mobs 29 31.9 Sandstorm Bridgewatch Cape CC Resistance Reduction 0.2 0.3

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Flame Pillar Great Fire Staff cooldown reduction 5s 50%

changes.raw_text: Flame Pillar: The cooldown reduction is not 5s anymore, but always reduces cooldown by 50% instead

subsections.heading: Capes
subsections.searchable_text: Capes Fey Barrier Brecilien Cape Shield Value 200 230 Opening to Hell Demon Cape Damage players 50 55 mobs 29 31.9 Sandstorm Bridgewatch Cape Crowd Control Resistance Reduction Factor 0.2 0.3

changes.raw_text: Opening to Hell: Damage vs players: 50 → 55; Damage vs mobs: 29 → 31.9
Sandstorm: Crowd Control Resistance Reduction Factor: 0.2 → 0.3

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Innate Power (Shapeshifter Staffs): Fixed issue where charges continued to be applied even after switching to a different passive
Crescent Slash (Clarent Blade): Range is now 18m, as intended
Fixed issue where UIs could scroll unpredictably
Fixed issue where spell audio could persist after cast canceled
Additional graphical, audio, UI, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Innate Power Shapeshifter Staffs charges passive Crescent Slash Clarent Blade Range 18m UI scroll spell audio cast canceled graphical audio localization
